use_cases: FAQ sections on product or help pages
ai_summary: A clean, accessible accordion component built on Radix UI primitives with smooth open/close animations. Features a card-style container with rounded borders, chevron rotation on state change, and proper focus/hover/disabled states. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and Lucide icons, making it ideal for FAQ sections, settings panels, or collapsible content organization in SaaS and e-commerce applications.
